ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE

Default Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Jan-04-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. Everett A. Hewlett, Jr., Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Elizabeth MacDonald, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Glenn Karonsky, an individual, who was not present at today's hearing.
No appearance by defendant Seiki Okada, an individual.
Default was entered against defendant on November 16, 2010.
Doe defendants were dismissed on December 1, 2010.
Order waiving witness appearance at prove-up hearing was filed on January 3, 2011.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Glenn Karonsky, an individual, and against the Defaulted Defendant Seiki Okada, an individual, as follows:

Damages/Principal - $160,000.00.
Prejudgment Interest - $46,288.00.
Attorney Fees - $3,186.00.
Costs - $495.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $209,969.00.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
